question: 1991 ke census year ke liye, har state ko list karo jismein total number of households aur average number of occupied residential houses ho, un states ko filter karo jahan total number of households 100 se zyada hai, aur results ko average number of occupied residential houses ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS), AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) > 100 ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dgh.state,
    SUM(fh.number_of_households) AS total_number_of_households,
    AVG(fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) AS average_number_of_occupied_residential_houses
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE fh.census_year = 1991
GROUP BY dgh.state
HAVING SUM(fh.number_of_households) > 100
ORDER BY average_number_of_occupied_residential_houses DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT
    dgh.state,
    SUM(fh.number_of_households) AS total_number_of_households,
    AVG(fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) AS average_number_of_occupied_residential_houses
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE fh.census_year = 1991
GROUP BY dgh.state
HAVING SUM(fh.number_of_households) > 100
ORDER BY average_number_of_occupied_residential_houses DESC;

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state ke liye aur 'Rural' category wale locations ke liye, har location ka naam, total population aur 1991 census ke hisaab se total households ki sankhya list karo, lekin sirf un locations ke liye jahan total households 100 se zyada hain. predicted_sql:
SELECT dgh.location_name, fpc.total_population, fh.number_of_households
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_population_core fpc ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fpc.hierarchy_id
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE dgh.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND dgh.location_type ILIKE 'Rural'
  AND fh.census_year = 1991
  AND fpc.census_year = 1991
  AND fh.number_of_households > 100
ORDER BY fh.number_of_households DESC;

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state ke liye 1991 census year mein, har district aur uski calculated household density list karo—jisme household density ko total households divided by total occupied residential houses define kiya gaya hai—ensure karo ki total occupied residential houses zero se zyada ho, aur top 10 districts with highest density dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) / SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) AS household_density FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) > 0 ORDER BY household_density DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.district,
    SUM(fh.number_of_households) / NULLIF(SUM(fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses), 0) AS household_density
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy d
JOIN fact_housing fh ON d.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE d.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fh.census_year = 1991
    AND fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses > 0
GROUP BY d.district
ORDER BY household_density DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.district,
    SUM(fh.number_of_households) / NULLIF(SUM(fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses), 0) AS household_density
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy d
JOIN fact_housing fh ON d.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE d.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fh.census_year = 1991
    AND fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses > 0
GROUP BY d.district
ORDER BY household_density DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Location name, state, aur district dikhaiye, saath hi total male scheduled caste population aur total female scheduled caste population un areas ke liye jahan households ki sankhya occupied residential houses se zyada ho, aur yeh ensure karein ki kam se kam ek housing record maujood ho; results ko location name, state, aur district ke hisaab se group karein aur unhe total male scheduled caste population ke descending order mein arrange karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T3.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION), SUM(T3.FEMALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_SOCIAL_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS > T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSING_ID) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dgh.location_name,
    dgh.state,
    dgh.district,
    SUM(fpsc.male_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_male_scheduled_caste_population,
    SUM(fpsc.female_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_female_scheduled_caste_population
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
JOIN fact_population_social_category fpsc ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fpsc.hierarchy_id AND fh.census_year = fpsc.census_year
WHERE fh.number_of_households > fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses
GROUP BY dgh.location_name, dgh.state, dgh.district
HAVING COUNT(fh.housing_id) >= 1
ORDER BY total_male_scheduled_caste_population DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT
    dgh.location_name,
    dgh.state,
    dgh.district,
    SUM(fpsc.male_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_male_scheduled_caste_population,
    SUM(fpsc.female_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_female_scheduled_caste_population
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
JOIN fact_population_social_category fpsc ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fpsc.hierarchy_id AND fh.census_year = fpsc.census_year
WHERE fh.number_of_households > fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses
GROUP BY dgh.location_name, dgh.state, dgh.district
HAVING COUNT(fh.housing_id) >= 1
ORDER BY total_male_scheduled_caste_population DESC;

predicted_sql:
SELECT dgh.location_name
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
JOIN fact_workers_tertiary_sector fwts ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fwts.hierarchy_id
WHERE fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses > 5000
  AND fwts.male_workers_trade_commerce > 1000
  AND fh.census_year = fwts.census_year
ORDER BY fh.number_of_households DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dgh.location_name
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
JOIN fact_workers_tertiary_sector fwts ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fwts.hierarchy_id
WHERE fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses > 5000
  AND fwts.male_workers_trade_commerce > 1000
  AND fh.census_year = fwts.census_year
ORDER BY fh.number_of_households DESC;

question: 1991 ke census year ke liye, 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state mein un districts ki list banao jahan mining and quarrying mein female main workers ki sankhya kam se kam 0.000 ho, aur sirf unhi districts ko include karo jahan livestock, forestry, aur fishing mein female main workers ka total sum exactly 0.000 ho, aur results ko district name ke hisaab se order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_WORKERS_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MINING_QUARRYING >= 0.000 AND T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_LIVESTOCK_FORESTRY_FISHING) = 0.000 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dgh.district
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_workers_primary_sector fwps ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fwps.hierarchy_id
WHERE dgh.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND fwps.census_year = 1991
  AND fwps.female_main_workers_mining_quarrying >= 0.000
  AND (fwps.female_main_workers_livestock_forestry_fishing) = 0.000
ORDER BY dgh.district;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dgh.district
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_workers_primary_sector fwps ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fwps.hierarchy_id

ORDER BY dgh.district;
